productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Cheese Flops Red Slipper
description: Take your kid to the beach or his friend's birthday party, pair it with shorts and a T-shirt with these rubber slippers from disney. Upper Foam upper for smooth comfort of the feet Thong straps with toe separator to hold the foot in place, and add comfort and style Soft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Jerry print on the footbed Outsole TPR textured outsole for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth
